## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Motivation or issue this addresses.

## How

Key implementation details (if non-obvious).

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Relevant tests pass
- [ ] User-facing docs were updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` was updated if this should be called out in release notes
- [ ] No new `as any` casts introduced
